title: Convert a multi-link navigation block to 1.7 idioms
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/navigation_mix_up.ex has a mix of push_redirect, push_patch (ok), live_patch, live_redirect, and live_link. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/orders_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.OrdersLive) using only 1.7 idioms: <.link patch={~p...}> for filter nav, <.link navigate={~p...}> for archived and new, push_navigate for new-order handler, push_patch for filter handler. Convert ~L to ~H and the <%= for %> to :for.
tier_rationale: Multi-site change across deprecated helpers. Requires knowing patch vs navigate discrimination.
